properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: On Calvary’s hill of sorrow Where sin’s demands were paid, And rays of hope for tomorrow Across our path were laid.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I see a crimson stream of blood. It flows from Calvary, Its waves which reach the throne of God, Are sweeping over me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Today no condemnation Abides to turn away My soul from His salvation, He’s in my heart to stay.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When gloom and sadness whisper You’ve sinned, no use to pray; I look away to Jesus And He tells me to say:

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when we reach the portal Where life forever reigns, The ransomed hosts grand final Will be this glad refrain.
